problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: If Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
